svg.aria-label: Interactive diagram: the three tokens of 'dog bites man' each become a vector, drawn as arrows in circles. One token's query vector and another's key vector meet in a detail circle, where the attention score is their dot product — proportional to the cosine of the angle between them, shown on a live bar from minus one to plus one. Drag the key arrow to change the angle and watch the cosine and score bar update. Shuffling the tokens moves none of the vectors, so every score stays the same.
svg.text: drawn in 2-D — real vectors have thousands of dimensions
Shuffle the tokens and nothing here moves — the vectors, and every score, stay exactly the same.
